message:
tests: add tests for doltutil and factory packages

Added tests for the only two packages with zero test coverage:
- doltutil: CloseWithTimeout success, error, and timeout cases
- factory: SQLite backend creation, read-only mode, backend registry,
  unknown backend errors, config loading, and Options zero value

Closes dolt-test-cg7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
